g.title: Duskmystforth A walled riverside city of abundant water but scarce freedom.
Voldranai A walled city of abundant culture and religion. Touchstone: a bookshop.
Dragon Road A logging village of abundant food and scarce space.
Daggercross A walled riverside city of abundant safety and scarce knowledge. Touchstone: a garden.
Frostbreeze A seaside village of abundant privacy but scarce freedom.
Underpool A coastal village of abundant beauty and scarce magic.
